strengths: Strong multi-language and full-stack expertise with 15+ years of experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Demonstrated AI-agent infrastructure work and AI-related product development (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Proven leadership in open-source projects and tech community engagement (e.g., GISCollective, workshops, talks)
concerns: Lacks explicit AI/ML academic credentials (e.g., no Master's/PhD in AI-related field) despite hands-on experience
Limited clear evidence of entrepreneurial or startup experience within larger organizations
Cloud expertise is not prominently highlighted in the resume
response.justification: Bogdan has significant full-stack and AI-adjacent experience (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure) with a strong track record in software engineering leadership and open-source contributions. However, his cloud expertise and formal AI credentials are less evident, which are key requirements for this role. His entrepreneurial experience is present but not clearly aligned with larger organizational contexts.
